name: Ajeya Pate
ai_summary: Ajeya Pate has 3 years of formal childcare experience as a floater and assistant teacher, building strong rapport with children through developmental support and engaging activities. She is a dependable, positive full-time candidate located 10 miles from Atlanta with proven conflict resolution skills and a genuine passion for teaching.

transcripts.q3:
Hi. My name is a Jaya pay and I worked with kids for about 3 years. Now, I started off as a floater and then I'll work my way up to being assistant teacher. I like rapport with kids because I like seeing them grow as little human beings and as well as the conversations I have with the kids, and, as well as being being able to help them with their development as children as well.
 Well.

transcripts.q5: I am looking for a full-time and my schedule is pretty much open. I have open availability, I'm willing to work. I can either open or want to do closing.

For the most part, if the heating continues to get out of hand, I will end up talking to the parents but I try to redirect the check, the chat, the children. And also talk to them about keeping our hands to ourselves. Have a nice and gentle hands.
